scripts.build:sim: xcodebuild -project AlfaScan.xcodeproj -scheme AlfaScan -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.build:app: xcodebuild -project AlfaScan.xcodeproj -scheme AlfaScan -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.clean: rm -rf build && xcodebuild -project AlfaScan.xcodeproj -scheme AlfaScan clean
